File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-iam/create-user/CreateUserForm.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 7 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 314, 321
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 311, 320
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```

  (line 320):

  321                    variant="plain"

```

  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Component <Page> has a new prop `banner` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <Page> and determine if any should be moved to the `banner` prop.

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-iam/create-user/CreateUserForm.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 314, 321): `Button.variant` type changed — `"primary"` and `"plain"` are still valid values in the new type. No change needed.

**Fix 2** (Lines 311, 320): Icon children to prop for `<Button>`. Looking at the Button usages:
- Line 311-318: `<Button variant="primary">{t('Create')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. No change needed.
- Line 320-327: `<Button variant="plain">{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. No change needed.

**Fix 3** (Line 297): Icon children to prop for `<HelperTextItem>`. The content is just text `{t(...)}`, no icon. No change needed.

**Fix 4** (Line 228): `<Page>` has new `banner` prop. Looking at the children of `<Page>`, there's `<PageBreadcrumb>` and `<PageSection>` — neither is banner content. No change needed.

**Fix 5** (Line 241): `PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` → `"light"` is no longer valid. Replace with `"default"` which is the closest match to `"light"`.

**Fix 6** (Line 31): Replace `Text` with `Content`. The usage at line 245 is `<Text component="p" className="text-muted">`. Replace with `<Content component="p" className="text-muted">`.

**Fix 7** (Line 30): Replace `TextContent` with `Content`. The usage at line 243 is `<TextContent>`. Replace with `<Content>`. But Fix 6 also introduces `Content` — so both `Text` and `TextContent` get replaced by `Content`, meaning we need only one `Content` import.

Also, `PageSectionVariants` is only used for `.light`. Since we're replacing it with a string literal `"default"`, we should remove the `PageSectionVariants` import.

Let me apply all changes:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed
**No change needed.** The values `"primary"` (line 314) and `"plain"` (line 321) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"` — no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children — both contain only text (`{t('Create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`). The rule does not apply here.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<HelperTextItem>`
**No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 297 contains only text content (`{t(...)}`), not an icon element. The rule does not apply here.

### Fix 4 — `<Page>` new `banner` prop
**No change needed.** The children of `<Page>` are `<PageBreadcrumb>` and `<PageSection>`, neither of which is banner content. No content needs to be moved to the `banner` prop.

### Fix 5 — `PageSection variant="light"` removed value
**Applied.** Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` (line 241). The value `"light"` was removed; `"default"` is the closest semantic replacement. Also removed the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` import.

### Fix 6 — `Text` deprecated, replace with `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `<Text component="p" className="text-muted">` (line 245) with `<Content component="p" className="text-muted">`. Removed `Text` from the import and added `Content` (shared with Fix 7).

### Fix 7 — `TextContent` deprecated, replace with `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `<TextContent>` (line 243) and `</TextContent>` (line 250) with `<Content>` and `</Content>`. Removed `TextContent` from the import. The `Content` import is shared with Fix 6 (only one `Content` import entry needed).

chunks.response:
## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed
**No change needed.** The values `"primary"` (line 314) and `"plain"` (line 321) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"` — no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children — both contain only text (`{t('Create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`). The rule does not apply here.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<HelperTextItem>`
**No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 297 contains only text content (`{t(...)}`), not an icon element. The rule does not apply here.

### Fix 4 — `<Page>` new `banner` prop
**No change needed.** The children of `<Page>` are `<PageBreadcrumb>` and `<PageSection>`, neither of which is banner content. No content needs to be moved to the `banner` prop.

### Fix 5 — `PageSection variant="light"` removed value
**Applied.** Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` (line 241). The value `"light"` was removed; `"default"` is the closest semantic replacement. Also removed the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` import.

### Fix 6 — `Text` deprecated, replace with `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `<Text component="p" className="text-muted">` (line 245) with `<Content component="p" className="text-muted">`. Removed `Text` from the import and added `Content` (shared with Fix 7).

### Fix 7 — `TextContent` deprecated, replace with `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `<TextContent>` (line 243) and `</TextContent>` (line 250) with `<Content>` and `</Content>`. Removed `TextContent` from the import. The `Content` import is shared with Fix 6 (only one `Content` import entry needed).
